prose.title: 17e mos
prose.body:
The 17E MOS, or Military Occupational Specialty, is the designation for the Field Artillery Target Acquisition Specialist in the United States Army.

As a 17E, your primary responsibilities would involve operating and maintaining various target acquisition systems, such as radars, laser range finders, and digital communications equipment. You would work closely with artillery units to help them accurately locate and engage enemy targets.

To qualify for the 17E MOS, you would need to meet all the necessary requirements, including physical fitness standards, as well as successfully complete the required training. It's important to note that specific qualification criteria and training programs may vary over time, so it's always best to consult the most up-to-date information provided by the U.S. Army for the 17E MOS.
